diagrams.title: Project Size Classification Scale
diagrams.description: Shows LOC ranges for Small, Medium, Large, and Very Large projects with visual representation
diagrams.purpose: Understanding size-based categorization for project planning and estimation

diagrams.title: COCOMO Project Type Triangle
diagrams.description: Three-point diagram showing Organic, Semi-detached, and Embedded project types with their characteristics
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how project constraints and team experience determine COCOMO classification

diagrams.title: Safety Criticality Pyramid
diagrams.description: Pyramid structure showing Level A (highest) to Level D (lowest) with examples
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how criticality affects testing rigor and regulatory requirements

diagrams.title: Categorization Criteria Overview
diagrams.description: Mind map showing all major categorization criteria for software projects
diagrams.purpose: Comprehensive view of all ways to categorize software projects
